- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions - No extensions required for this project.
- [x] Compile the Project
- [ ] Create and Run Task - Deferred. A VS Code task can be added if you want a one-click dev server command.
- [ ] Launch the Project - Launch only after user confirmation.
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

Execution notes:
- Use the current workspace root as the project root.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
- For this project, automatic tweet import is best effort only; manual editing and local uploads are the reliable fallback.
